calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas Osorio (650-580-5728) appears as defendant/moving party, In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DOUGLAS OSORIO'S Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment For Leave To Defend The Action is DENIED without prejudice to being refiled. Insufficient notice per Code of Civil Procedure 1005. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order tracking the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
